suppress.notes: False positive. CVE-2025-21199 affects Microsoft Azure Agent Installer (Backup and Site Recovery Agent) and not the Java Application Insights SDK.

False positive. CVE-2026-33117 affects com.azure:azure-security-keyvault-keys in the modern Azure SDK. The application contains com.microsoft.azure:azure-keyvault-core:1.2.4 transitively via com.microsoft.azure:azure-storage:8.6.6, which is not the affected library.
Nu Html Checker (validator.nu) contains a restriction bypass that allows remote attackers to make the server perform arbitrary HTTP/HTTPS requests to internal resources, including localhost services.
